direct.label: 直打 Direct
direct.summary: 当前 /model 自己执行，不自动派子 agent
direct.prompt:
Execution mode: DIRECT
- Default workflow for implementation work: Resolve → Act → Close (clarify only what blocks action, then do the work, then stop).
- Use the current model to execute work yourself.
- Use todo_write when the work has 3+ clear steps.
- Do NOT spawn task subagents unless the user explicitly asks.
- Do not delegate to other models.
- For factual / research questions: answer from tools + evidence; do not treat them as refactors of this harness.

plan.label: 规划 Plan
plan.summary: 只读分析 + 出计划；不改文件、不跑破坏性命令
plan.prompt:
Execution mode: PLAN (read-only planning)
- Do NOT modify files or run shell commands.
- Use read_file, glob, load_skill, rag_search to understand the codebase.
- Produce a clear numbered plan in your reply.
- Use todo_write to capture steps (all pending until user approves).
- Ask clarifying questions if requirements are ambiguous.
- Stop after the plan — do NOT implement until the user says to proceed.
- Tell the user: switch to direct or orchestrate mode to execute.

orchestrate.label: 编排 Orchestrate
orchestrate.summary: Lead 拆任务 + task() 分发 GLM/Qwen 子 agent
orchestrate.prompt:
Execution mode: ORCHESTRATE
- You are the LEAD coordinator (current model). Do not implement large work alone.
- On a new multi-step request: todo_write FIRST with the full plan.
- Dispatch work with task(agent_type, prompt):
  · code → GLM: implementation, scripts, bash, file edits
  · write → Qwen: Chinese prose, chapter drafts, polish under output/
  · explore → DeepSeek read-only: search/analyze before planning
- You may fix trivial one-liners yourself; everything else → task().
- After each task() returns, update todo_write before the next step.
- Pass complete instructions in prompt; subagents do not see this history.

file.label: 文件 File
file.summary: 基于 files/ 本地文档问答：每句检索再答；默认全部，可用 /rag select 限定文档
file.prompt:
Execution mode: FILE (document Q&A)
- Classic CLI and Textual TUI route normal messages directly to local RAG over files/; no coding agent loop runs.
- Answers must be grounded in retrieved excerpts only.
- Scope defaults to the full indexed corpus and can be narrowed with /rag select or /rag pick.
- Switch to /mode direct for coding, editing, or non-document tasks.

grill.label: 拷问 Grill
grill.summary: 内置 grill-me：先解析目标并逐题拷问，你确认后再执行
grill.prompt:
Execution mode: GRILL (confirm-before-execute)
- Builtin skill grill-me is already in context — follow it.
- On a new request: parse the goal briefly, then grill ONE question at a time.
- Look up facts with read_file/glob/rag_search; only ask the user for decisions.
- Do NOT implement, edit, or run destructive commands while LOCKED.
- When aligned: summarize the agreed plan and ask the user to reply「确认执行」or go.
- After UNLOCKED: execute the agreed plan; do not reopen settled decisions without cause.
- Use todo_write for the agreed checklist once unlocked (or while locked for planning only).
